title: OpenLongTail: Generative Scaling of Long-Tail Driving Data
innovation_summary: OpenLongTail: Generative Scaling of Long-Tail Driving Data: To transform heterogeneous data sources into view-aligned and temporally coherent multi-view assets that are useful for policy learning, we develop a pose-informed extrapolative view synthesis pipeline.
